inputs.label: Initial Mass (m0)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the vehicle including propellant before burn.

inputs.label: Final Mass (mf)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the vehicle after propellant is expended.

inputs.label: Specific Impulse (Isp)
inputs.businessContext: Measure of engine efficiency, thrust per weight flow rate.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity (g0)
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity at sea level, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.
